title: RAID Sidemount Diver
description: Master the fundamentals of sidemount configuration. This course covers harness setup, cylinder mounting, buoyancy, trim, and propulsion — everything you need to dive sidemount confidently in open water.
image_alt: Two sidemount divers on a reef wall

title: RAID Advanced Sidemount
description: Take your sidemount skills further. Advanced trim work, redundant system management, gas switching, and more complex dive profiles. Prerequisite: RAID Sidemount Diver or equivalent.
image_alt: Sidemount diver in dark open water

title: RAID Tech Sidemount
description: The bridge between recreational sidemount and full technical diving. Decompression procedures, stage cylinder management, and advanced gas planning — all in the sidemount configuration.
image_alt: Technical diver on deco stop with twin cylinders and DSMB

title: RAID Tech Trimix Sidemount
description: Full technical trimix training in sidemount configuration. Deep decompression dives, helium gas mixes, and the comprehensive skill set required for deep technical exploration.
image_alt: Sidemount divers descending a reef wall

title: Sidemount Crossover
description: Already trained in backmount technical diving? This crossover programme translates your existing skills into the sidemount configuration efficiently — no backtracking, no repeated theory.

title: Sidemount Instructor Training
description: Train with a RAID Crossover Instructor Trainer to earn your sidemount teaching credential. Covers student management, skill development pathways, and the nuances of teaching configuration-specific diving.
